title: What's New in Version {{version}}
description: Here are the recent improvements and new features we've added

platformImport.title: Move data between Web and Desktop
platformImport.description: Import a TEN10 backup file and choose whether to replace your data or merge it with what you already have. Duplicate detection was added, and import speed is improved, especially on Desktop.

analyticsPage.title: Analytics Dashboard
analyticsPage.description: A new financial dashboard with insights, category breakdown, payment methods, donation recipients, recurring vs. one-time charts, and activity heatmap. Includes PDF export.

analyticsPerformance.title: Faster Analytics Loading
analyticsPerformance.description: Analytics data loads significantly faster — changing date ranges feels much more instant

chomeshTracking.title: Separate Chomesh Balance Tracking
chomeshTracking.description: Track your chomesh balance separately from maaser. To enable: go to Settings → Financial Settings

settingsSync.title: Automatic Settings Saving
settingsSync.description: Settings are automatically saved and synced — no need to worry about losing them

bugFixes.title: Bug Fixes & Stability
bugFixes.description: Fixed several bugs, including an issue with automatic recurring transactions

emailPrivacy.title: Your Email Privacy
emailPrivacy.description: We never send emails without your consent. To receive updates and reminders, enable this in Settings. We promise not to spam or share your email with third parties
